summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Control Center implementation. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working perfectly. Demo admin login, navigation, and all 6 control center zones functioning as specified.
passed_tests: Demo admin login via 'Demo Admin Access' button on /admin/login page works correctly
Admin dashboard loads with proper sidebar navigation including Control Center link
Control Center link in sidebar successfully navigates to /admin/control-center
Control Center page loads with all 6 zones: System Snapshot, Live Pipeline, Delivery Risks, Team Health, Project Health, Action Queue
System Snapshot displays all 6 metrics: Active Units (0), In Review (0), In Validation (0), Blocked (0), Pending Deliverables (0), Overdue (0)
Live Pipeline shows all 6 columns: Backlog, Assigned, In Progress, Review, Validation, Done - all properly labeled and structured
Delivery Risks section correctly shows 'All Clear - No delivery risks detected' when no risks present
Team Health section displays Developers (1) and Testers (0) tabs with proper counts and developer info
Project Health section shows 'No projects yet' message when no projects exist
Action Queue section displays 'All caught up!' message when no pending actions
Refresh button is present and functional - successfully triggers data refresh
Project filter dropdown present with 'All Projects' option
Timeframe filter dropdown present with 'Today', 'Last 7 days', 'Last 30 days' options
Session authentication working correctly with demo admin user
All data-testid attributes present for robust testing
Professional dark theme UI with proper spacing and visual hierarchy
Real-time indicator showing in Live Pipeline section
User info (Demo Admin) displayed correctly in header with logout functionality
